name: Crimson Tide
description: The Kragmore Clans fight with industrial might and sheer numbers. Nine missions of grinding, relentless conquest.

missions.name: The First Hammer
missions.briefing: A rival clan controls a rich Cordite deposit. Crush them.

missions.name: Iron Advance
missions.briefing: Bastion border fortifications block the advance. Bring them down.
missions.twist: Bastion has pre-built defence networks — use artillery to break them before advancing.

missions.name: Sky Resistance
missions.briefing: Valkyr air support is protecting Bastion positions. The sky must be cleared.
missions.twist: Anti-air units are essential — build flak nests early.

missions.name: The Sea Route
missions.briefing: Naval routes offer a surprise flank around Bastion defences.
objectives: Land forces on the southern peninsula
missions.twist: Landing craft are vulnerable to air attack — escort them.

missions.name: Ironmarch Rival
missions.briefing: Ironmarch is competing for the same resource deposits. They must be driven out.
missions.twist: Ironmarch will attempt to dig in — attack before they establish supply lines.

missions.name: The Long Siege
missions.briefing: A massive Bastion citadel-city must fall. This will take patience and heavy ordnance.
missions.twist: Bastion will call for reinforcements from Valkyr and Ironmarch allies.

missions.name: Stormrend Ambush
missions.briefing: Stormrend has ambushed a Kragmore supply convoy. The ambushers must be hunted down.
missions.twist: Stormrend units are fast and mobile — Kragmore's heavy armour must cut off escape routes.

missions.name: The Arcloft Network
missions.briefing: Arcloft's surveillance grid has exposed Kragmore movements to all enemies. Destroy it.
missions.twist: Arcloft will detect and counter-attack any force that approaches the relays.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: The Cordite Nexus — the largest deposit ever found. Kragmore tanks will crush any who stand in the way.
objectives: Be first to establish a Refinery on the Cordite Nexus
missions.twist: All factions converge. Kragmore's edge is sheer firepower — use it.
